text:
effective 10/01/2018
720 GG0130H1_ON_OFF_FTWR_STRT_CD GG0130H1_ON_OFF_FTWR_STRT_CD GG0130H1 On Off Footwear Start Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to put on and take off socks and shoes or other footwear that is appropriate for safe mobility; including fasteners, if applicable at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or
